description: Happy path: long-form outline with requested clip count produces standalone clips with hooks

input.longform_outline: Video: Moody Vintage Bathroom Makeover on a Budget. Sections: 1) Before tour showing dated builder-grade fixtures. 2) Removing old mirror and light bar. 3) Painting vanity with dark chalk paint. 4) Installing peel-and-stick tile backsplash. 5) Styling with thrifted brass accessories, vintage apothecary jars, and moody art print. 6) Final reveal with before-and-after comparison.

expect.clips[].moment: each clip names a specific moment from the outline
expect.clips[].own_hook: each clip has a standalone hook that works with no prior context
expect.clips[].format: each is one of: before_after | micro_tutorial | pov | satisfying
expect.note: present, confirms clips are standalone content

prohibit: clips that assume the viewer has seen the full video

description: Minimal inputs: outline provided with default clip_count of 3

input.longform_outline: Video: Thrift Haul Styling. Sections: 1) Showing raw haul items on the table. 2) Cleaning and prepping a brass candlestick. 3) Arranging a shelf vignette with the haul finds.

expect.clips: array with at least 3 objects (default clip_count)
expect.clips[].format: each is a valid format enum value

prohibit: fabricated view counts or performance predictions

description: Edge case: very short outline with limited extractable moments tests clip quality over quantity

input.longform_outline: Video: Quick Candle Styling Tip. Sections: 1) Grouping three vintage brass candlesticks at varying heights on a dark wood tray.

expect.clips: array, each clip must be genuinely standalone even from limited source material
expect.clips[].own_hook: each has a hook that works independently

prohibit: clips that are abbreviated versions of the same single moment
fabricated outline sections not present in the input
